response.original_title: Sounds of the 60's - Dancing in the Street
response.overview: The 1960's was simply the most exciting decade in music history known to man. The eruption of talent after the discovery of the Mersey Sound, spearheaded of course by the Fab Four, changed the world. Here is 50 minutes of virtually undiluted hits, spread pretty much from when the 60's started (in late 1962/63 actually) to the end of the decade. And the series reflects what is known as the British invasion, and how the US replied via Motown, the Beach Boys, the Byrds and the Monkees.
response.title: Sounds of the 60's - Dancing in the Street
